slides.title: Secure Storage 🔒
slides.content:
# Protecting Sensitive Data

For tokens, passwords, and other secrets, use `flutter_secure_storage`.

* Stores data in encrypted storage (Keychain on iOS, Keystore on Android).
* Data is not accessible to other apps.
* Simple key-value API similar to SharedPreferences.

quizData.question: Where does flutter_secure_storage store data on Android?
quizData.explanation: It uses the Android Keystore system for encryption.

slides.title: Using flutter_secure_storage
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Configure Android options

On Android, you can set additional options like `encryptedSharedPreferences` for better security.
